chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2444 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 14.01.2025 Mr. Raj Ali Wahid, advocate for the petitioner Learned counsel submits that purpose of filing of this petition has been served, therefore, this petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
